component.name: MarkeDitor
component.summary: Cross-platform Markdown editor with live preview

description.p: MarkeDitor is a lightweight Markdown editor built on Avalonia. It pairs a syntax-highlighted editor with a live native preview, side by side, and stays out of the way while you write.

ul.li: Live preview synchronised to the editor position
Syntax highlighting for fenced code blocks (TextMate grammars)
Extended Markdown: footnotes, heading IDs, highlight, task lists, subscript / superscript, definition lists, emoji shortcodes
HTML export with an editable embedded stylesheet, plus "Copy as HTML" for rich paste into LibreOffice / Gmail / Slack
Paste images straight from the clipboard into the document folder
Spell-check (French + English via Hunspell) with a per-user custom dictionary

screenshot.caption: The editor and live preview side by side

description.p: Extended Markdown features, HTML export with editable CSS, clipboard image paste, emoji picker, editor context menu, smarter scroll sync, and several bug fixes.
